title: pouteria bracteata
intro: Pouteria bracteata, also known as the Yellow Sapote, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The extracts and compounds from Pouteria bracteata have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Pouteria bracteata can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
